overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval town at sunset. The character navigates narrow cobblestone alleys with timber-framed buildings, passes NPC villagers, and emerges toward a stone tower against a dramatic pink sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley with timber-framed houses

events.description: character passes a woman NPC walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone alley between stone and timber buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in dress carrying a basket, walking toward the character

entered.detail: tall medieval house with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
solid stone building with small windows and rough texture
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance
wooden construction scaffolding attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval alley with timber-framed buildings on the right and stone buildings on the left. Long shadows from the setting sun create a warm golden light on the facades. A woman NPC carrying a basket walks past the character in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone path opening toward town square

events.description: character turns left, revealing the stone tower against the dramatic pink sunset sky
character passes a male villager standing near a doorway on the right

agents.ego_description: turning left and continuing to walk, revealing more of the pink sunset sky and the distant tower

notable_agents.action: male villager standing near a doorway, gesturing with his hand

entered.detail: dramatic pink and orange sunset sky becoming visible between the buildings
arched stone gateway structure at the base of the tower

segments.scene_description: The character turns left as the alley opens up, revealing a dramatic pink sunset sky behind the stone tower. The lighting shifts to show the tower silhouetted against the colorful sky. A male villager stands near a doorway on the right as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to castle gate with sunset backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the stone tower and gate against the backdrop of the vivid pink sunset

entered.detail: wooden plank or beam lying on the cobblestone ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a more open area toward the stone tower and gate, with the expansive pink sunset sky dominating the background. The tower grows larger as the character approaches. A fallen wooden beam lies on the cobblestones to the left, and the scene is devoid of other people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow medieval alleyway bathed in the warm, shifting light of a setting sun. It begins by tracking the character as they navigate a corridor flanked by timber-framed houses on the right and stone structures on the left. As the character advances, long shadows stretch across the cobblestones, intensifying the golden glow on the building facades. The scene then captures a brief encounter as a woman carrying a basket walks past in the opposite direction before the camera continues its steady progression deeper into the town.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow alleyway into an open town square dominated by a towering stone structure under a vivid sunset. It begins as the character turns left, causing the cramped surroundings to give way to a dramatic pink sky that silhouettes the distant tower. As the character passes a villager standing by a doorway, the lighting shifts to emphasize the colorful horizon. The scene then expands into a wider cobblestone area, moving past a fallen wooden beam on the left as the tower and its gate grow larger in the frame. Finally, the camera advances through the now-empty square, with the expansive sunset sky filling the background.
